component.name: Caerus
component.summary: A package manager for Void Linux

description.p: Caerus is a GTK4 package manager for Void Linux, inspired by Synaptic and built directly on libxbps. It runs entirely unprivileged — only the small helper that actually installs, removes, or upgrades packages is ever elevated, via polkit.

Features a sortable, searchable package table with bulk marking; a real transaction preview computed by libxbps itself before anything is applied; dependency and reverse-dependency impact checks; full system upgrade, orphan removal, and package database verification; and repository management.

screenshot.caption: Main window: sortable package table with state and repository filters
